For the detail, download the attached file. Read More Download Apply for Accommodation For Accommodation: Kindly forward your advance application and intimation to JUIT Alumni Cell by filling out this form. At least 96 hours (4 days) excluding holidays in advance. Your request can only be addressed when we receive your request at least 96 hrs. (4 days) excluding holidays in advance. We shall confirm availability or otherwise 24 hrs. before the date of Arrival. Read More Request Alumni ID Card Alumni Cell is planning to issue a Membership ID card. If you want to get your Alumni ID card. Please fill the form. Read More Please select from choose form for request of Transcript, Degree, Alumni ID card or Apply for Accommodation. Choose Form Request Transcript Request Degree Apply for Accommodation Request Alumni ID Card Select Degree B.Pharm B.Sc. B.Tech BBA BS DSc M.Pharm M.Sc. M.Tech MBA MS (R) Ph.D. Select Branch Bioinformatics Biotechnology Chemistry Civil Engineering Computational Biology Computer Science & Engineering Electronics & Communication Engineering Humanities and Social Sciences Information Technology Materials Science Mathematics Microbiology Pharmaceutics PHR Physics Physics and Materials Science Structural Engineering How to Collect In person By Post Relationship with Accompanying person Spouse Parents Friend Other Relative (Specify) Meals required yes No Upload image of receipt upload File SUBMIT About Us All who hail from the JUIT have set out on their own incredible journeys, building a life of success and enriching experiences.
